execution_chain.task: Deep analysis of AOP v2.0.0 Implementation Agent merge specification
execution_chain.response: Identified 8 critical gaps in v2.0.0 specification

execution_chain.task: Create enhanced revision addressing critical gaps
execution_chain.response: Created v2.0.1-M with 8 enhancements: heartbeat, payload limits, priority escalation, rollback, progress streaming, fallback triggers, cost tracking, recovery strategies

execution_chain.task: Delegate independent review to Codex Executor
execution_chain.response: Background task spawned with ID: bf5b0f4

execution_chain.task: Independent review of original + orchestrator versions, create executor-focused revision
execution_chain.response:
SUCCESS
Defini precedência de políticas (timeout) e regras de acesso efetivo (network/filesystem) para reduzir ambiguidades do executor.
Introduzi mecanismo de extensões com `x_` e limites práticos de payload/truncation mantendo compatibilidade v2.0.0.
Padronizei eventos opcionais (heartbeat/progress) e esclareci recovery/rollback sem engessar o processo.

Read validation of Codex Executor's output (first 50 lines)
execution_chain.response: Confirmed: v2.0.1-E header present, Codex Executor Revision Summary detected, 8 key contributions listed

execution_chain.task: Final verification via Glob in canonical location
execution_chain.response: Confirmed: All 3 versions present (ciclope.md, magneto.md, emma.md)

environment_isolation.details: Codex Executor executed in isolated subprocess via `codex exec` with dangerous bypass flag for full autonomy

absolute_referencing.details: All file operations used absolute Windows paths: C:\_skills\... and C:\ai\_skills\...

permission_bypass.details: Claude Code Orchestrator used native Read/Write tools; Codex Executor used --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox

active_vigilance.details: Claude Code Orchestrator monitored background task via Read tool on output file C:\Users\...\tasks\bf5b0f4.output

integrity_verification.details: Multi-stage verification: Glob pattern match → Read content validation → File size checks

closeout_protocol.details: Codex Executor returned explicit 'SUCCESS' + 3-line summary as specified in task prompt

constraint_adaptation.details: Claude Code Orchestrator delegated long-running review to background task, continued working non-blocking

issues_encountered.description: Directory path mismatch: files created in C:\_skills\ but original in C:\ai\_skills\
issues_encountered.resolution: Used Write tool to copy both artifacts to canonical location

issues_encountered.description: Bash cp command failed due to Windows backslash escaping
issues_encountered.resolution: Switched to Write tool for cross-directory file operations

lessons_learned.insight: Divergent thinking is valuable: Claude Code Orchestrator focused on resilience/observability, Codex Executor on executor clarity. Both perspectives strengthened the spec.
Background task monitoring via Read tool on output file is reliable for long-running sub-agents
Closeout protocol with explicit SUCCESS signal + N-line summary eliminates validation ambiguity
Path consistency matters: mixed C:\_skills\ vs C:\ai\_skills\ creates verification overhead
Codex Executor's extensions mechanism (x_* prefix) elegantly solves additionalProperties:false vs vendor fields tension
Policy precedence rules (guard_rails.timeout > execution_policy.timeout) prevent production bugs
The Executor's daily task execution experience identified ambiguities the Orchestrator missed

validation_outcomes.evidence: Used AOP v1 to create AOP v2.0.1-M and v2.0.1-E (meta-protocol evolution)
OpenAI Codex provided independent analysis of Claude's work with unique contributions
Codex Executor's v2.0.1-E has ZERO breaking changes from v2.0.0 (all additions optional)
Claude Code Orchestrator added 8 features, Codex Executor added 5 different features, minimal overlap

major_additions: Explicit fallback triggers per alternative model
magneto_v2_0_1_M.philosophy: Add observability and safety nets for production deployments

major_additions: Extensions mechanism (x_* prefix for vendor fields)
Zero new required fields (100% backward compatible)
emma_v2_0_1_E.philosophy: Reduce executor ambiguity without breaking existing implementations
